inputs.label: Cumulative GPA
inputs.businessContext: Student's cumulative grade point average on a 4.0 scale

inputs.label: Cum Laude Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Minimum GPA required for Cum Laude honors

inputs.label: Magna Cum Laude Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Minimum GPA for Magna Cum Laude honors

inputs.label: Summa Cum Laude Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Minimum GPA for Summa Cum Laude honors

inputs.label: Total Credits Completed
inputs.businessContext: Total credit hours completed by the student

inputs.label: Credits Required for Honors
inputs.businessContext: Minimum total credits required to be eligible for Latin honors

formulas.honors: (totalCredits >= creditsRequired) ? (gpa >= summaMin ? "Summa Cum Laude" : gpa >= magnaMin ? "Magna Cum Laude" : gpa >= cumLaudeMin ? "Cum Laude" : "No Latin Honors") : "Insufficient credits for Latin Honors"
formulas.cumLaudeStatus: (gpa >= cumLaudeMin && totalCredits >= creditsRequired) ? "Cum Laude: Eligible" : "Cum Laude: Not Eligible"
formulas.magnaStatus: (gpa >= magnaMin && totalCredits >= creditsRequired) ? "Magna Cum Laude: Eligible" : "Magna Cum Laude: Not Eligible"
formulas.summaStatus: (gpa >= summaMin && totalCredits >= creditsRequired) ? "Summa Cum Laude: Eligible" : "Summa Cum Laude: Not Eligible"
formulas.thresholdsInfo: "Thresholds: Cum Laude >= " + cumLaudeMin + ", Magna >= " + magnaMin + ", Summa >= " + summaMin + ". Credits required: " + creditsRequired
